channel.title: Programming on Coding, Software, Automation, Testing, DevOps, RPA, Tools
channel.description: Recent content in Programming on Coding, Software, Automation, Testing, DevOps, RPA, Tools

item.title: SOLID Principles Simplified with Examples
item.description: SOLID is an acronym created by Michael Feathers from the principles of object-oriented programming identified by Robert C. Martin (Uncle Bob). These principles aim to make the code more readable, easy to maintain, extensible, reusable and without repetition.

item.title: How to get My Public IP address Using Node.js
item.description: The Problem An IP is short for Internet Protocol. It is used to identify computers or mobile devices on the Internet. Each device connected to the Internet has an IP address. Ever needed to get your public IP address programmatically using Node.
